init.description: Short interview, write PRODUCT.md + STRATEGY.md (north star + goals), nudge harness automation

ingest.description: External stimuli — file customer research, metrics, or notes into memory (not part of the loop)

insights.description: Observe — compare product in your codebase to Darin memory; one insight file per finding

next.description: Pick the biggest needle move from latest insights, write a scoped brief, hand off to your coding agent

review.description: Optional weekly sweep for stale evidence and drift from your goals
